name: calendar_feed_flatten
description: Cross-boundary contract for the calendar feed (ARCH-6 spirit for the Go->JSON->Python boundary): FlattenForTUI must turn the producer envelope (feeds.CalendarTestFixture) into exactly the flat cache entry the Python TUI renders. Consumed by internal/bridge (Go: envelope -> expected_flattened) and tui/tests (Python: expected_flattened -> rendered segment). The frozen updated_at is intentionally in the past: the Python stale-case test consumes the fixture as-written, and the fresh-case test re-stamps updated_at before rendering (post-PR#249 the TUI gates on freshness).
